summary: Frontend testing of Load Board features. Found and fixed a CRITICAL bug in the weight formula that caused ALL load cards to be filtered out (0 loads shown). After fix, all 15 test cases pass: Ghost Dispatcher header, dynamic location subtitle, RPM Target editable field with localStorage persistence, Max Weight editable field with localStorage persistence, Refresh button, distance badges, rate color coding (green/orange), stats bar, and Book Now buttons all work correctly.
action_items: Weight formula bug was ALREADY FIXED by the testing agent (line 122 of LoadBoard.tsx). The fix changed: Math.round(comm.minWeight + r(5) * (comm.maxWeight - comm.minWeight) / 1000) * 1000  → Math.round((comm.minWeight + r(5) * (comm.maxWeight - comm.minWeight)) / 1000) * 1000. Main agent should confirm this fix is intentional and correct.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL (FIXED): LoadBoard.tsx line 122 had wrong operator precedence in weight formula. `Math.round(comm.minWeight + r(5) * range / 1000) * 1000` computed as `Math.round(35000 + 0.04) * 1000 = 35,000,000` lbs instead of 35,000-48,000 lbs. All 8 generated loads had weights > 46200 lbs threshold causing ALL to be filtered out by `filteredLoads`. Fix: added parentheses around the full range expression: `Math.round((comm.minWeight + r(5) * range) / 1000) * 1000`.

When userLocation is null (GPS denied in test environment), the subtitle shows 'Near Locating...' which is expected behavior. The default Detroit fallback ([42.3314, -83.0458]) is used for load generation even when location is null.

LoadBoard.tsx is well-structured at 499 lines with clear component separation (EditableField, LoadCard, LoadBoard). The distance badges ('X mi from you'), rate color logic, and localStorage persistence are all correctly implemented.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 15 test cases pass after weight formula fix)

seed_data_creation: Set localStorage 'trucker_last_location' = Detroit [42.3314, -83.0458] for testing (no GPS available in headless browser environment)
context_for_next_testing_agent: App at http://localhost:8001. USE_MOCK_DATA=true in FirebaseProvider.tsx so no auth required. Load Board accessible via 'Load Board' in left sidebar. To see load cards, set localStorage 'trucker_last_location' = [42.3314,-83.0458] (Detroit) before page load - otherwise location shows 'Locating...' but loads still generate with Detroit fallback. All Load Board features verified: EditableField (RPM Target, Max Weight), localStorage persistence, refresh button, distance badges, rate color coding, stats bar, Book Now buttons. Weight formula bug fixed (line 122).
rca_of_issue: ROOT CAUSE: generateLoads() in LoadBoard.tsx line 122 had incorrect parentheses. Formula: `Math.round(comm.minWeight + r(5) * (comm.maxWeight - comm.minWeight) / 1000) * 1000`. Due to operator precedence, `r(5) * range / 1000` was computed first (giving ~0.04 for LUMBER range=13000), then added to minWeight (35000), giving ~35000.04. Math.round gives 35000. Multiply by 1000 = 35,000,000 lbs. This made all weights millions of lbs, far exceeding the 46200 lbs filter threshold (maxWeight * 1.1 = 42000 * 1.1), causing `filteredLoads` to always be empty. MITIGATION: Fixed parentheses to `Math.round((comm.minWeight + r(5) * (comm.maxWeight - comm.minWeight)) / 1000) * 1000` which correctly rounds to nearest 1000 lbs in the intended range.

test_results.near_location_subtitle: PASS - shows 'Near Detroit, MI' when location set; 'Near Locating...' when null
test_results.distance_badges: PASS - 8 badges with 'mi from you' text
test_results.rate_color_green_meets_target: PASS - emerald-400 class for rates >= target
test_results.rate_color_orange_below_target: PASS - orange-400 class for rates < target
test_results.weight_formula_bug: FIXED - was producing 35,000,000 lbs instead of 35,000 lbs
